productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Girls TW Big Facelog Green Sandals
description: It's comfort and fun rolled into one in this Tweety Big Facelog from Warner Brothers. These clogs are crafted from soft PU in a single casing, offering unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Upper Soft PU forefoot strap with cut outs to accommodate jibbitz PU foxing with print on the outer midfoot region Appliqued cartoon character on the forefoot strap Movable and flexible backfoot strap made of PU PU footbed ergonomically grooved for all-day comfort Outsole Textured PU outsole with leaf-rib lugs for grip and traction Care Wipe with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
